stories.name: extend-is-flux-available-with-custom-dirs
stories.title: Extend is_flux_available to check custom model directories
stories.description: Modify is_flux_available() in textbrush/model/weights.py to accept an optional list of custom directories. When custom directories are provided, check each for model_index.json before falling back to HuggingFace cache. The handler will pass config.model.directories when calling this function.

includes: Modify is_flux_available() signature to accept optional custom_dirs parameter
Check each custom dir for model_index.json marker file before HF cache check
Update tests for the extended function
Ensure backward compat: default (no custom_dirs) behaves as before

stories.notes: is_flux_available currently only calls try_to_load_from_cache. Need to also check custom directories as a first pass before HF cache.

stories.name: add-model-discovery-in-init-backend
stories.title: Add model discovery and credential-based download logic in _init_backend
stories.description: Modify _init_backend in textbrush/ipc/handler.py to check model availability before calling backend.initialize(). Logic: (1) call is_flux_available(custom_dirs=config.model.directories); (2) if available, proceed as before; (3) if missing, check for credentials (HUGGINGFACE_HUB_TOKEN env, config.huggingface.token, ~/.cache/huggingface/token file); (4) if credentials found, emit state_changed(loading), call download_flux_weights(), then proceed to backend.initialize(); (5) if no credentials, emit fatal error with actionable instructions from FR3. Wrap in try/except for graceful degradation.

includes: Implement credential detection (3 sources in order)
Emit fatal error state when model missing and no credentials
Graceful degradation: wrap in try/except to fall back to original behavior on unexpected errors
Add unit tests for all new code paths

stories.notes: The HF token env var used in weights.py is HF_TOKEN, but the spec says HUGGINGFACE_HUB_TOKEN. Need to check both. The HF CLI cache file check requires reading ~/.cache/huggingface/token.

dependency_notes: Story 01 changes the is_flux_available signature, Story 02 uses the new signature. However, they can be made independent by having Story 02 import and use is_flux_available with the new signature only after Story 01 is complete.
mock_resolution_plan: No temporary mocks introduced. All model availability checks are mockable via the existing patch patterns in tests/test_weights.py and tests/test_ipc_handler.py.
